title: A1 Intermédio
intro: The student understands common words, phrases, and expressions related to personal, school, and everyday topics. They can locate and understand simple information in interactions and short texts, and participate in basic exchanges and short discussions with support. They interact with greater independence, asking for and providing information about themselves and others, and describing simple experiences and events. They produce simple, understandable texts with reasonable grammatical accuracy, despite some vocabulary limitations and influence from their first language.
objectives: Conversational fluency on familiar and unfamiliar topics
Comprehension of longer texts and detailed narratives
Writing longer compositions with coherent structure
Deeper engagement with Portuguese and Lusophone culture
topics: Culture and traditions of Portuguese-speaking countries
